docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY LEADING PROPERTIES HO, JENNY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT LEADING PROPERTIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PATRICK BOUSHELL, PRESIDENT, WITH PLAINTIFF WITNESS STUART THOMPSON. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT JENNY HO IS PRESENT, WITH CROSS COMPLAINANT WITNESS CASEY BELWAY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF CLAIM ON FILE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON CROSS CLAIM. ***PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE.*** PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LEADING PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT HO, JENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-22-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $97.50 AS TO DEFENDANT HO, JENNY
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,118.00 FILED BY HO, JENNY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LEADING PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT HO, JENNY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LEADING PROPERTIES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PATRICK BOUSHELL, PRESIDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEADING PROPERTIES
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2026 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HO, JENNY RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LEADING PROPERTIES $3,502.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,567.00, EFFECTIVE BALANCE FROM OCTOBER'S OWNERS STATEMENT MINUS NOVEMBER MANAGEMENT FEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT LEADING PROPERTIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PATRICK BOUSHELL, PRESIDENT, WITH PLAINTIFF WITNESS STUART THOMPSON. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT JENNY HO IS PRESENT, WITH CROSS COMPLAINANT WITNESS CASEY BELWAY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF CLAIM ON FILE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON CROSS CLAIM. ***PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE.*** PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEADING PROPERTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HO, JENNY EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN ATTORNEY FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LEADING PROPERTIES MAILED TO RESPONDENT HO, JENNY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR APR-23-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LEADING PROPERTIES
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LEADING PROPERTIES
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF'S & DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-23-2026 - OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.
